name: Rise to Full Height
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>仁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>立</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ち
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; double its DEF, but its DEF becomes 0 at the end of this turn. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 monster you control; your opponent's monsters cannot attack for the rest of this turn, except to attack that monster. You can only activate 1 "Rise to Full Height" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; double its DEF, but its DEF becomes 0 at the end of this turn. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 monster you control; your opponent's monsters cannot attack for the rest of this turn, except to attack that monster. You can only activate 1 "Rise to Full Height" per turn.

attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
